explanations.1: We're creating a directed graph object (digraph) using pydot, which is a library that helps us draw diagrams and save them as images.
explanations.14: We're creating an Edge object that connects two nodes and immediately adding it to the graph; this shows that Student inherits from Person in our class hierarchy.
explanations.18: This writes the graph we built to a PNG image file on disk, so we can actually see the diagram we created.
